content: Even though We thoroughly enjoy this game, 'tis difficult to recommend this game to another. While the motifs & theming and the game mechanics are all amazing, it might be a bridge too far for most.
Aigis over Leigh? interesting
For Ghelot
I'm stealing this comp once my bias 0 logic pure design choice comp can't work anymore 🫡

One of the reasons Aigis is more valued to us versus Leigh is a few aspects. Leigh's abysmal stats is definitely a factor and how her other cards, besides Unfulfilled Pain, can scale off. Towards the end, We were only playing Leigh for their Exaltation and Unfulfilled Pain.
If Ramona Circ is holding Thais's wheel, what is a good replacement wheel for Aigis?

Aigis is a wonderful character to carry important team-oriented Wheel of Destinies (usually brown Wheel of Destinies). We have her hold Lullaby of Devourment -- not necessarily because it is fantastic -- for the Death Resistance and additional utility.

Chaos:
Pandia, too little Retaliate Generation for the cost, Ult and removing enemy retaliate is her only uses
Lily, Extremely mediocre without enlightens, with enlightens still kinda just alright.
Loop Ramona, cant figure out whether she wants to be a main or sub dps
Doll, extremely niche, really needs ryker to heal good. Her strike and defence cards are useless besides the ult generation.
Doll slander
I live for this
I may be using her for 24
but if i wasnt using 24 she would be rotting

Aequor:
Celeste, less healing then doll and rng tentacle proc. Can remove the increase card cost debuff and give arith but without that shes basically weaker doll, she also doesnt give ally aliemus, and doesnt cleanse vulnerable so if you cant take advantage of her giving you more arith she is worse Doll. (Doll also requires no pulls to become lvl 80 so she will have the stat advantage unless you really invest into celeste or get unlucky). also only revives once which is very situational
Aurita, Bricks your deck for an ok payoff on ult ( YOU NEED TO BUILD UP TENTACLE DMG BEFORE THAT TOO BTW)
Faros, Does not have good poison application, poison proc is negligible until enemy has extremely high poison stacks but for a defense oriented unit her main source of tanking is on ult.

Caro:
Agrippa, not as bad as i usually say she is since she has decent embryo application, decent buffs and decent poison application. Problem is how expensive her shit is. Also there is only 1 Caro poison unit so its hard to justify using Caro Poison over Aequor or Chaos Poison
Base Helot, extremely hard to play to get the payoff that is just alright (Support Base Helot doesnt count)
Uvhash, just needs a little stronger ult ramp cause currently can be a little slow especially if you dont have the unlimited devour relic.
Faint, Aggresive Retaliate is a nice concept, but being a death resist tank means you need another tank. Chaos also doesnt have as good of retaliate generation as Aequor or Ultra.

Then you can build around orison's with tentacle attacks and exalts that force tentacle attacks (Murphy, Caecus)
Doesn't make her outright broken but gives poison a proper place.

Ultra:
Liz, you build up for a burst of dmg in 1 turn. Too bad its poison dmg and enemy have dmg reduction now.
Jenkins, way too arith expensive and doesnt synergise that well with any supports besides Ryker and Horla. Also has no crit rate in her kit to take advantage of her high crit dmg buffs so you need to invest a lot into jenkins covenant and wheel wise
Casiah, only viable for 1 strategy and that is Daffodil where she can take out the cards daffodil creates in the shadow realm while allowing daffodil to still ult again and put a different card inside. No use otherwise.
Erica, Tank + dps but suffers from having consistency issues
Especially in a place where Aqueor is dominated by Murphy/Tulu comps since they provide just so much for so little.
